chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 906 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.4087/2019 3. For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 Mr. M. Usman Alam, advocate holds brief for Mr. Sami Ahsan, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. This petition is pending since 2019 without any significant progress. Even today, six years later, brief is being held for petitioner’s counsel and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
